sourceText: Freedom is not something that can be preserved in all its purity without a constant struggle.
translatedText: Uhuru si kitu ambacho kinaweza kuhifadhiwa katika usafi wake wote bila mapambano ya mara kwa mara.

sourceText: The most important function of government is to protect the liberty of the people.
translatedText: Kazi kuu ya serikali ni kulinda uhuru wa watu.

sourceText: Every part of an organism is intimately connected to its way of life.
translatedText: Kila sehemu ya kiumbe imeunganishwa kwa karibu na njia yake ya maisha.

sourceText: Fossils are invaluable records of past life.
translatedText: Visukuku ni rekodi muhimu sana za maisha ya zamani.
